description: A taxpayer with a tax debt is experiencing extreme financial hardship and cannot afford any payments.

nodes.task_description: Gather detailed financial information from the taxpayer to prove financial hardship.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary income, expense, and asset information.

nodes.task_description: Contact the IRS to request that the account be placed in Currently Not Collectible (CNC) status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the IRS collections department.

nodes.task_description: Provide the required financial documentation to the IRS to support the CNC request.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the financial forms, and the IRS agrees to place the account in CNC status.
